comments.text: Sir icici insuranace vale to har saal paise badhate hai. Maine 2020 me insurance liya tha jo ki mujhe 10 hjar me mila. Lekin jab maine 2021 me insurance liya tha mujhe 15 hjar me policy di. Fir 2022 me 21 hjar me policy di. Is saal 2023 me 28 hjar ki policy kah rahe hai. 4 saal me 18000 rupey badha diye ICICI valo ne. Ghatiya company hai jhuth bol kar insurance bechte hai ki 5 saal tak koi premium nahi badhega lekin har saal premium badhate hai koi na koi बहाना bana kar premium badhate hai har saal icici insuranace vale. Ye mera experience hai or kisi company ne bhi aisa kiya hai to jrur btaye.
